Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time until Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER is performed after Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER after the execution of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in variants that include rejections by PRE_APPROVER later in the process
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in cases that eventually lead to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER compared to the average time for Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER and the end of the case

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in variants containing multiple rejection cycles
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER and the end of the case

Name: Time of Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER relative to the subsequent Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER after Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER to Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET_OWNER in cases that restart with Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in variants that also include Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER downstream
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs
